welcome: In this game you can find a lot of examples of how to use this engine in different ways.
Explore around and find out the features.
You can always exit the game by holding escape key.
Don't forget you can also toggle between fullscreen with F4[w:10], just like in Undertale.

Have fun![w:20]
And remember[w:10], stay determined!

inst_kris_dog_1: [bind_instance:inst_kris_dog_1]Hi[w:10], I'm a test entity that has a dialog interaction.
If you talk to the other entity on the left I will look as if I'm talking too.
[bind_instance:ref object obj_entity]That's because we both are instances of the same object[w:10], but with different data on creation
inst_kris_dog_2: [bind_instance:ref object obj_entity]As you can see there are many interaction collisions around here.
You can exit this room if you talk to the interaction object on the right.
[bind_instance:inst_kris_dog_1]Just tell it that you don't know and it will let you pass[w:10], easy as that.

dialog: I'm an example of a grid choice dialog.
interaction_1.option_1: This option is nice yes[w:20], but pick something else.
interaction_1.option_2: Second is also good[w:20], not as good as first but not the worst.
option_3: They say third is the charm[w:20], but that only matters on attempts.

interaction_2.dialog: [progress_mode:none]Are you a dialog test?[func:ref script start_plus_choice,320,430,false]
interaction_2.option_1: Nice[w:20], we can be friends then!
interaction_2.option_2: ...[w:20]Then don't talk to me ever again.

dialog:
Are you a dialog test?[w:20]
I will give you more options than the jerk on the left.
interaction_3.option_2: That's ok[w:20], I won't judge you for that[w:20], you're beautiful inside :3
interaction_3.option_3:
Sometimes the answer is not clear...[w:20]
I hope you figure that out.
interaction_3.option_4: Well I don't know either[w:20], let's leave it like that.

interaction_4: You can't get past me![w:20] Yippie!
interaction_5: But why are you stepping on me...[w:20] So rude!

not_moved: Halt![w:20] if you want to pass[w:20], then tell me who's the king of the underground.
interaction_6.moved: Hello again[w:29], the path is open for you now.
interaction_6.option_1: [asterisk:true]Go kill yourself instead[w:20], he's not that important in the story to be the center of everything.
option_2: [asterisk:true]Just because it's the brother of the one skeleton that beats you up good in genocide...
Doesn't mean it can be a king to the underground[w:20], don't be stupid.
interaction_6.option_3: [asterisk:true]Wing Gaster?[w:20] Pff[w:20], don't be stupid[w:20], that dude doesn't exist.
option_4: [asterisk:true]...[w:20]Well[w:20], at least you're honest[w:20], you may pass then.

entity_1: [bind_instance:inst_entity_1]This collision block on the right is awesome!
It took some days for the creator to get right[w:10], but it was worth it I would say.
entity_2:
However I'm scared of heights![w:10]
Please help me get down!

not_angy: [bind_instance:inst_entity_3]The puzzle on the left isn't much of a puzzle if you ask me.

You only push boxes around the maze to the buttons.[w:20][effect:shake,0.5]
AND THAT'S IT!
[effect:shake,1]THIS IS NOT A PUZZLE, IT'S A STUPID LAME EXCUSE OF A "PUZZLE".
entity_3.angy:
[bind_instance:inst_entity_3][text_speed:10]...[w:20][text_speed:2]
I don't know how to turn back to normal...

entity_4: [bind_instance:inst_entity_4][func:inst_entity_4,instance_talk,inst_kris_dog_cotton]I'm not part of the kris dog group either.
However I use a function to make the rightmost kris group entity talk and me only.
This is a more proper way to animate multiple entities to talk simultaneously.
[func:inst_entity_4,instance_talk,inst_plate_1]Now I switch and make the button flicker alongside with me[w:10], nice.
entity_5: [bind_instance:ref object obj_entity,0,1]I'm not part of the kris dog group sadly...
Therefor I have no name[w:10], my dialogs however use the object index to make me talk.
As you can see the kris group and even the button down there is affected by this.
This is not a good way to animate overworld sprites if there are multiple entity objects here.
So instead you should use a custom function like the one on the right does.
entity_6: [bind_instance:ref object obj_kris_dog_group]We are part of the entity group kris dog.
[bind_instance:inst_kris_dog_cotton]I believe the name doesn't make sense[w:10], we are vessels but oh well...
entity_7: [bind_instance:ref object obj_kris_dog_group]We are part of the entity group kris dog.
[bind_instance:inst_entity_7]I was placed backwards to demonstrate you can do this with any entity.
entity_8: [bind_instance:ref object obj_kris_dog_group]We are part of the entity group kris dog.
[bind_instance:inst_entity_8]That means we are instances of an object that heredates from the entity object[w:10], kind of like classes.

not_pushable: [bind_instance:inst_entity_9]You can also push me around[w:10], I'm an entity after all.
Oh wait[w:10], you can't push me right now.
I will make myself pushable then[w:10][func:inst_entity_9,become_pushable], give it a try now!

entity_10:
My dialog doesn't restrict your movement.[w:20]
You can move around as I talk.

Go on[w:10], give it a try![wait_for:inst_entity_10,detect_movement][w:30]
Awesome[w:10], right?
However if you interact with something else that has dialog[w:10], it gets replaced.

entity_11.dialog:
[no_skip][progress_mode:none][bind_instance:inst_entity_11]Don't interrupt me.[w:20]
I'm trying to annoy the dog on the left.[w:120][next]

entity_12: So you can see they work just fine no matter the orientation of the scaling.
collision:
Hey hey hey![w:20]
Do not dare to approach me.
You cannot pass through me[w:10], unless you solve that puzzle over there.
puzzle: You are done with this puzzle.

berry: It's so hot here too[w:20], I don't like it.
At this rate I'm gonna literally melt!
I have random voices by the way[w:20], you better like them.
papyrus: [subimages:8,9]ALTHOUGH WHAT AM I DOING HERE?[w:20][pop_up:left instant,160,48,"[font:fnt_papyrus,false/][asterisk:false/]AND WHERE IS SANS?!",140,spr_papyrus,10,11]
[subimages:4,5]I WAS SUPPOSED TO BE IN THE SNOWY AREA!
[subimages:10,11]THIS IS NOT WHAT I SIGNED UP FOR!
[subimages:16,17]ALSO WHY AM I A WEIRD DOG SHAPED MONSTER?[w:20][pop_up:right,160,48,"[font:fnt_papyrus,false/][asterisk:false/][no_voice/]IT FEELS AWKWARDLY ODD!",140,spr_papyrus,2,3]
ANYWAYS[w:30][subimages:0,1], I GUESS I'LL JUST CHILL HERE THEN!

outlander.interaction:
[bind_instance:inst_outlander][effect:malfunction,100,true][apply_to_asterisk]NOOOOO!!![w:20]
I'M A ROCK NOW!!!![w:20]
HOW AM I GONNA WALK NOW?!
outlander.dialog_1:
[bind_instance:inst_outlander][effect:oscillate][apply_to_asterisk]It's so fricking hot...[w:20]
I can't bear it anymore...

dialog_1: It's so easy to do that I don't understand how anyone could get stuck doing that.
dialog_2:
[bind_instance:inst_entity_3]Achoo![w:20]
I feel like someone is talking about me...
scary_kris.dialog_3:
[bind_instance:inst_scary_kris_dog]Hey you still there?[w:20]
You should go find some water perhaps.

faceless_1:
I'm a moving entity.[w:20]
I'm made so I turn towards you when you talk to me.
I also push you around if you are on the way I wanna go.
I'm dumb enough to not know when I'm hitting a wall so I still move towards the direction I choose
I use the exact same sprite you have since there's not another one available.
No hard feelings about that[w:20], right?
faceless_2:
I'm a different moving entity.[w:20]
I'm made so I take into consideration your position and my surroundings.

Unlike the other one.[w:20]
This means I move where there's space always.
Try as you want, you can't force me into a corner.
Your collision is rectangular[w:20], that's why you can't.
And even if you somehow manage to do it by changing your collision[w:20], I just won't move.
kris_1: [bind_instance:inst_kris_1]We all in this room have temperature resistance actually.
That guy that transformed into a rock was just not from this room though...
He tried to leave but a collision told him to solve the puzzle.

Unfortunatelly the puzzle was on the other side...[w:20]
Such a sad fate...
kris_2: [bind_instance:inst_kris_2]I'm an entity that will move when you talk to me using a path resource.
When this dialog ends I'm gonna move.

Dude end already.[wait_key:confirm]
..........[wait_key:confirm]
Ok enough, I will move.

[func:inst_kris_2,move_entity]Even with a dialog playing.[w:20]
Screw you game.
kris_3: [bind_instance:inst_kris_3]Try to not get in the way of our rock ball.
Things might get...[w:20] weird with collisions.
kris_4: [bind_instance:inst_kris_4]Try to not get in the way of our rock ball.
Things might get...[w:20] weird with collisions.

dialog: [bind_instance:inst_coach]I can activate random encounters for this room.
When you exit the room[w:20], encounters will be disabled
Because the trigger to change the room of this room deactivates them.
[progress_mode:none]Do you want to activate random encounters?[w:20][func:ref script start_plus_choice, 340, 430]
[progress_mode:none]Do you want to deactivate random encounters?[w:20][func:ref script start_plus_choice, 340, 430]

flowey_1: [sprite_x_offset:30]Here you can find the battle tests stuff.
[sprite_x_offset:100]Browse the code of every instance in this room.
[sprite_x_offset:-100]So you know how to do stuff like that.
flowey_2: [font:fnt_determination_mono]If you touch those trigger collisions[w:20], you will have to dodge an attack.
flowey_3: [bind_instance:inst_flowey_3]The area below me is a separate custom random encounter generator.
That means you will encounter different enemies only when you're colliding with that area.
I would recommend turning off the global random conditions.
Go talk to the guy above to disable them if have them enabled.

flowey_4.dialog: [progress_mode:none][bind_instance:inst_flowey_4]Do you want to test out the platform attacks?[w:30][func:ref script start_plus_choice, 320, 430]

flowey_5.dialog: [progress_mode:none][bind_instance:inst_flowey_5]Do you want to test out some special enemies?[w:30][func:ref script start_plus_choice, 320, 430]

cell.gaster_call: The man who speaks with the hands is not available right now...

initial_dialogues.two_mad_dummies_drawn: Two Mad Dummies join battle to persuade you to use drawing functions.
initial_dialogues.two_mad_dummies_sprited: Two Mad Dummies attempt to sell you sprited functions through battle.

Two monsters engage with you.[w:30]
Taking turns?

Not in a romantic way.
initial_dialogues.angy_monster_1:
A Monster engages with you.[w:30]
In an angry way.
initial_dialogues.mad_dummy_drawn_2:
[w:30]
Another one joins to draw your attention.
initial_dialogues.mad_dummy_sprited_2:
[w:30]
Another one joins to sprite them away.

dialogues.end_turn: I have a dialog after the attack too!

Mad Dummy - ? ATK inf DEF[w:20]

dialogues.flee: Don't you dare try to flee on us again.

check:
Mad Dummy - ? ATK 999 DEF[w:20]
This dummy in particular is made using draw function.
It contains a bit of a shield against attacks.

box_dialogues.random_2: Monster showcases its skillful platform attacks.
box_dialogues.random_3: You are blue...[w:30] or are you orange?

dialogues.item_used: [color_rgb:255,255,255]Can I have some of your item too?

check:
Monster - [ATK] ATK [DEF] DEF[w:20]
This monster has actual functional atk and def.
Use ACT to change the values up or down.
act_dialogues.annoy:
You annoy the monster...[w:30]
It gets angrier.[w:30]
ATK and DEF increased!
act_dialogues.fluster:
You fluster the monster...[w:30]
It calms down a little.[w:30]
ATK and DEF decreased!

box_dialogues: Why is this monster taking turns?
The monster is pretending to play like the human...[w:30] sort of?

dialogues.cant_be_targeted: Now I hide in the shadows...

check:
Turn Monster - [ATK] ATK [DEF] DEF[w:20]
This monster takes turns to attack.
Alternating between being able to be targeted or not.

box_dialogues.random_1: Monster scream angrily for longer turns.
box_dialogues.random_2:
Monster knows your IP address.[w:30]
Oh no.

check:
Angy Monster - [ATK] ATK [DEF] DEF[w:20]
